notes: Real per-record latency_ms trace captured from a live producer->Kafka->streaming_consumer.py run (8000-event reservoir sample, seed=7, Dec 2021 data, 10s trigger interval). Histogram shows a clear staircase/multi-modal pattern with ~9-10s-wide humps separated by near-empty buckets, consistent with the trigger-interval/backlog-drain mechanics of Spark Structured Streaming micro-batching -- NOT a heavy-tailed anomaly. No evidence of the paper's claimed p99=375s / ~60x-p95 blowup was found; this run's p99/p95 ratio is ~1.03x.
